goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'cambridge' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should 'arrive by 20:30' and should depart from 'leicester'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'west' and should be in the 'moderate' price range.
The hotel should have 'a star of 3'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '2 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should leave on saturday
The train should arrive by 20:30 and should depart from leicester
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the west and should be in the moderate price range
The hotel should have a star of 3
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 2 people and 3 nights starting from the same day
Make sure you get the reference number
